tagline: Building reliable, secure, and highly available SQL Server environments.
description: SQL Server DBA Fresher skilled in SQL Server Administration, Backup & Restore, HA/DR, Security, and Performance Tuning. Focused on database availability and reliability.

roles.detailed: SQL Server Administration · Backup & Restore · HA/DR · Database Monitoring

bio: MCA Graduate and aspiring SQL Server DBA with hands-on experience in Backup & Restore, Database Mirroring, High Availability & Disaster Recovery (HA/DR), Security Management, Monitoring, and Troubleshooting. Skilled in SQL Server Administration, Node.js, Next.js, React, and MongoDB, with knowledge of database performance optimization and maintenance. Passionate about building reliable database systems, scalable web applications, and AI-powered solutions while continuously learning modern technologies and industry best practices.

bullets: Worked on full stack development tasks using AI-assisted tools like Cursor and Trae IDE to speed up development and debugging.
Built and modified frontend components and backend logic using modern JavaScript frameworks with AI support.
Improved development efficiency by leveraging AI tools for code generation, refactoring, and problem solving.
experience.desc: Full stack internship focused on AI-assisted development using Cursor and Trae IDEs for faster coding, debugging, and feature implementation across frontend and backend tasks.

bullets: Created and managed Hyper-V virtual machines to build isolated SQL Server DBA practice environments.
Installed and configured SQL Server instances for hands-on administration practice.
Implemented Backup & Restore strategies to ensure data recovery and integrity.
Practiced Log Shipping and Database Mirroring to understand High Availability and Disaster Recovery concepts.
Worked on SQL Server Agent Jobs, maintenance plans, and scheduled database tasks.
Performed performance monitoring, index management, and basic query optimization techniques.
experience.desc: Hands-on SQL Server DBA lab using Hyper-V to practice core administration, backup strategies, HA/DR concepts like Log Shipping and Mirroring, and performance tuning.
